final_records.title: SRA
final_records.description:
SRA accepts unassembled reads from high throughput sequencing platforms.
                            Submitted data files should generally be minimally processed and include per-base quality scores.

final_records.title: SRA
final_records.description: Submit unassembled reads of SARS-CoV-2 with BioProject, BioSample, metadata and NGS files.

final_records.title: GEO
final_records.description: GEO accepts raw data, processed data and metadata for gene expression and epigenomics datasets generated by high-throughput sequencing and microarray technologies.

final_records.title: Genome
final_records.description: Submit assembled complete or incomplete/draft prokaryotic and eukaryotic genomes. Not for viral, phage, or single locus sequences (for example: 16S rRNA). Submit those to regular GenBank .

final_records.title: TSA
final_records.description: Computationally assembled transcribed RNA sequences representing a transcriptome derived from sequence reads submitted to Sequence Read Archive (SRA).

final_records.title: TLS
final_records.description: Large-scale sequencing projects for an individual loci are taken in GenBank & Sequence Read Archive (SRA).

final_records.title: Supplementary Files
final_records.description: Submit BioNano maps, Beta-lactamase gene, and PacBio methylation data.

final_records.title: dbSNP
final_records.description: Small human genomic variation: single nucleotide, insertions, deletions, and microsatellites.

final_records.title: GTR
final_records.description: Genetic tests for inherited & somatic genetic variations, including arrays and multiplex panels.

final_records.title: BioProject and BioSample
final_records.description: Automatically create a BioProject and BioSample during sequence data submission.

final_records.title: How to download custom data sets
final_records.description: ADDITIONAL LINKS  Large Data Download Best Practices SRA Download Reference
